productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Kids Girls Pink Shorts
description: Composition Pink shorts made of 100% cotton, has a zippered and buttoned closure in the front, loops on the waist and two pockets on the sides Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours in a delicate cycle Do not bleach Tumble dry low or lay flat to dry Warm iron when needed Do not iron on print The cute statement simply zooms high when you dress your little girl in this cute denim skirt from united colors of benetton. Team this with a girly top and sandals.
